hook.summary: A young boy named Jason shares how his math skills improved significantly after using the app.
hook.visual_action: A close-up of an 8-year-old boy talking, transitioning to a bright orange and blue graphic.
hook.voiceover_transcript: When I started Prodigy, my math skyrocketed.

scene_flow: Testimonial from an 8-year-old boy named Jason about his math progress.
Animated graphics emphasizing that the app builds math skills through play.
The boy explains the transition from struggling with math to excelling.
Split-screen showing kids' excitement while playing the game and actual gameplay footage.
Closing screen with the app logo, a cartoon character, and a call to action.
on_screen_text: Prodigy builds math skills through play!
audience_proxy: Parents of elementary-aged children looking for engaging educational tools to improve math skills.
